message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber

participant "DASH client" as DASHClient
participant "License proxy" as LicenseProxy
participant "License server" as LicenseServer

DASHClient -> LicenseProxy : Get license
activate LicenseProxy
LicenseProxy -> LicenseProxy : Check if user is authorized
LicenseProxy -> LicenseServer : Get license\n(Proprietary proof of authorization attached)
activate LicenseServer
LicenseServer --> LicenseProxy : License
deactivate LicenseServer
LicenseProxy --> DASHClient : License
deactivate LicenseProxy

@enduml
```
